reviews.comment:
Es mi lugar preferido para cargar combustible,me atienden mis vecinos,"de diez".

(Translated by Google)
It's my favorite place to fill up with fuel; my neighbors serve me "perfectly."
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18262014614826625245/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMtaEtxOE5REAE

reviews.comment:
Muy mala atención por parte de las chicas del drugstore, cómo no hay expebdedor de agua caliente, le solicite a esas dos chicas, miraron el bidón de agua y me dijeron que fuera más tarde.
Gracias por todo

(Translated by Google)
Very poor service from the girls at the drugstore. Since there was no hot water dispenser, I asked them for some. They looked at the water cooler and told me to come back later.
Thanks for everything.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18262014614826625245/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMtZ0tUYkpBEAE

reviews.comment:
Cargamos de regreso a Buenos Aires y solo fue pedir agua. Y se lo sintió molesto al empleado a pesar de abonar 80$el mismo

(Translated by Google)
We refueled on our way back to Buenos Aires and all we had to do was ask for water. And the employee seemed annoyed despite us paying $80.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18262014614826625245/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURlN3VYVnhBRRAB

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
